weatherAlerts.title: Flood Alert - Marikina City
weatherAlerts.description: Water levels rising rapidly in Marikina River. Residents in low-lying areas should evacuate immediately. The river is expected to breach critical thresholds within the next 2 hours.

weatherAlerts.title: Flood Watch - Pasig City
weatherAlerts.description: Potential flooding in low-lying areas due to heavy rainfall. Residents are advised to be on standby for possible evacuation.

weatherAlerts.title: Typhoon Alert - Northern Luzon
weatherAlerts.description: Severe tropical cyclone approaching from the Pacific. Wind speeds of up to 120 kph expected. Prepare emergency supplies and secure outdoor items. Avoid unnecessary travel.

weatherAlerts.title: Thunderstorm Warning - Central Luzon
weatherAlerts.description: Strong thunderstorm expected with heavy rainfall and lightning. Residents should stay indoors and avoid using electrical appliances.

weatherAlerts.title: Heat Advisory - Metro Manila
weatherAlerts.description: Heat index may reach 40-42°C. Stay hydrated, avoid prolonged sun exposure, and check on elderly residents.
